tools.name: Imperium Patch Visual Proof
tools.purpose_ru: Создаёт owner-facing смотровую для Trinity Plus patch: terminal board, markdown summary, HTML dashboard и machine proof.
tools.purpose_en: Builds owner-facing visual proof for Trinity Plus patches: terminal board, markdown summary, HTML dashboard and machine proof.
tools.validation_recipe: Run py_compile, build visual proof from repo hygiene report, verify terminal/md/html/json outputs exist.
